variant_label: Oil production & trade — Annual revenues from consortium's sale of Iranian oil abroad
notes: Cited by the author to Mark Gasiorowski, U.S. Foreign Policy and the Shah (1991), 102-103, and Mary-Ann Heiss (1994) -- this RAC report is a secondary synthesis citing those primary/scholarly sources, not itself a primary document. [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.1]

variant_label: Government Finance — Second Seven Year Plan original budget
notes: Development plan implemented by the Plan Organization (Sazman-e Barnama) under Abdolhossein Ebtehaj. [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.2]

variant_label: Government Finance — Second Seven Year Plan revised (raised) budget
notes: Budget was later raised from the original $930 million/70 billion rials figure. [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.2]

variant_label: Foreign investment — Ford Foundation grant to support the Harvard Advisory Group (HAG)
notes: Grant for a three-year period; also meant to supplement salaries of US-trained Iranians returning to work at the Plan Organization's Economic Bureau. [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.6]

variant_label: Government Finance — Estimated excess of Iran's state spending over revenues by September 1962 (Hansen/Farmanfarmaian projection)
notes: US Embassy considered the estimate optimistic; indicated a looming financial crisis once foreign-exchange reserves became depleted. [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.6]

variant_label: Government Finance — Cumulative Plan Organization spending, with difficult-to-measure achievement
notes: "After several years and $505 million, it was difficult to measure what the Plan Organization had achieved." [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.7]

variant_label: Macro / National Accounts — Third Development Plan targeted average annual GNP growth rate
notes: Goal articulated by Hansen and Farmanfarmaian for the Third Plan, contrasted with the more ad-hoc "shopping list" approach of the Second Plan. [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.9]

variant_label: Balance of Payments — Balance of payments crisis following a bad harvest, requiring emergency IMF financing
notes: Austerity measures followed: state salaries frozen, additional development projects scrapped. No specific dollar amount given in the source text for the IMF financing itself. [cite: Gregory Brew, "Economic Expertise and Rural Improvement in Iran, 1948-1963" (Rockefeller Archive Center Research Reports), 2017, p.9]
